commentary_text: Postal volumes continue structural decline; parcel growth partially offsetting. Yield erosion persists.
Peak season demand lifted parcel volumes 18% MoM, but yield per parcel fell 2.3% vs prior year.
Cargo segment performing strongly; new Q3 2024 contract fully annualised. Margin ahead of budget.
Aviation fuel costs increased 4% in month due to regional pricing; partially hedged.
Marine fleet fully back in service post-dry-docking. Revenue recovery on track.
Logistics margin under pressure — subcontractor cost inflation running ahead of price recovery.
Retail footprint rationalisation completed; like-for-like sales up 3% YoY.
Digital certificates volume up 22% YoY, driving segment profitability inflection.
